claim: Galimard's Signature Atelier in Grasse costs €99 for a 2-hour workshop and sends each participant home with a personalised 100ml Eau de Parfum.
quote: The Signature Atelier costs 99 € (for children 15 and under: 89€), and the workshop duration is 2 hours... You create your unique fragrance and leave with your very own 100ml Eau de Parfum.

claim: MIGLOT (Antwerp/Ghent) runs a 2.5-hour Eau de Parfum workshop at €195/person; the take-home is a personalised travel spray in a leather case, with the option to reorder larger sizes from the saved formula.
quote: Each participant receives their unique Eau de Parfum in Travel Spray format in a trendy leather case... €195.00 ... 2.5 hours.

claim: Manalys Brussels charges €250 per couple for a 3-4 hour ring-making session, with the metal (rings start €450) priced separately and finished pieces delivered 1-2 weeks later.
quote: Workshop experience: €250 per couple. Wedding rings: starting from €450... 3-4 hours... 1-2 weeks after the workshop for finishing and quality control.

claim: Iriss Studio in Antwerp's Diamond District runs a 4-hour lost-wax silver ring class for around $228 USD; the cast 925 sterling ring ships or is collected 3-4 weeks after the workshop.
quote: Price: $228.00 USD ... Duration: 4 hours ... cast into 925 sterling silver after the workshop ... up to 3-4 weeks after the workshop.

claim: Studio bxlart in Molenbeek (Brussels) runs a 4-hour beginner stained-glass workshop for €129/person with a maximum group of three; participants finish a soldered 20×20cm panel during the session.
quote: Price: €129 per person... Approximately 4 hours... Small groups of 3 people maximum... Finished Piece Size: Participants create artwork approximately 20x20cm.

claim: Malina More Studio in Anderlecht runs a 2.5-hour public pottery session for €65; fired pieces require a four-week return trip, while air-dry alternatives are not food-safe.
quote: €65 per person... 2.5 hours total... Fired clay: Food-safe pieces that require pickup of pieces at our studio after 4 weeks. Air-dry clay: Not food-safe; participants leave with their piece immediately.

claim: Kover-st's beginner tufting school in Brussels ("Let's Make a Rug") is a one-on-one 4-5 hour session that produces a 40×50cm rug, all materials included.
quote: Duration: 4-5 hours... Group Size: Individual/one-on-one format only... Rug Size Created: 40×50 cm... All materials and tools are provided by the school.

claim: WatMatjeNou (Rotterdam) advertises a same-day-takeaway tufting workshop with materials and instruction included, beginner-friendly with no prior experience required.
quote: Everything included: materials, guidance & your own fluffy art piece to take home right away!

claim: Tuftlab Amsterdam guarantees a same-day finished custom rug for tufting workshop participants.
quote: we not only provide comprehensive instruction in the basics of tufting, but also ensure that you leave our doors with your very own custom rug on the same day.

claim: El Dorado Casting Lab's couples wax-carving workshop costs $400 for two participants over 3 hours and includes up to 20g of sterling silver, no experience needed.
quote: $400 per 2 participants ... 3-hour couples workshop ... sterling silver up to 20 grams total with no experience needed.

claim: Pepper Tree Studio (UK) bundles silver-clay ring making into an 8-hour private workshop where the kiln-fired ring is polished and worn home that day.
quote: 8-hour private workshop where participants create their own silver ring, which is kiln-fired and then polished and finished to take home.

claim: ClassBento's Silver Clay Ring Workshop produces a finished, hallmark-grade silver ring within 2-3 business days of the session, with stones set during class.
quote: you'll walk away with your custom-made silver ring by the end of class. The piece is finished within 2-3 business days after the workshop.

claim: American Express Travel's 2026 Global Travel Trends Report finds 82% of respondents say learning a new skill while travelling creates a more memorable experience, and 76% feel skills outlast material souvenirs.
quote: 82% of respondents say learning a new skill while traveling creates a more memorable experience... 76% of global respondents believe the skills they gain on a trip remain with them longer than any material souvenir.

claim: Wecandoo formats every workshop around an artisan instructor and a take-home object, with sessions lasting from two hours to several days.
quote: Wecandoo workshop durations usually vary from 2 hours to a day, but can last several days. Workshops include the creation of an object to take home with you at the end of the workshop.

claim: Wecandoo Belgium aggregates Brussels artisan workshops across pottery, jewellery, perfume, candle, glass and cosmetics categories under a single gift-voucher system.
quote: Discover the artisan workshops of Brussels.

claim: GlazenHuis, the Flemish centre for contemporary glass art in Lommel, offers introductory glassblowing workshops alongside more advanced technical sessions.
quote: Glass blowers teach the tricks of the trade, with offerings ranging from introductions to glass blowing and casting to specific technical or experimental workshops for advanced students.

claim: Rombachs Glass in Antwerp is a public studio that runs hot-shop workshops, team-building sessions and demonstrations for participants of all skill levels.
quote: Rombachs Glass is a public waste glass studio that offers workshops, teambuildings, demonstrations and private parties for all those interested in working with glass.

claim: The Silver Hand Workshop in Bruges runs handmade silver ring workshops, couples wedding ring sessions and bespoke commissions, taught by a UK-trained silversmith.
quote: Handmade silver ring workshops for groups, Couples wedding ring workshops, Bespoke jewelry commissions... 25+ years of jewelry-making experience, having studied at The Jewellery School in Birmingham.

claim: Manitou Candle Co.'s class produces two 11oz custom-scented soy candles per student in roughly 1.5 hours.
quote: each student will make two 11 oz candles of their custom scent, with class time typically lasting 1.5 hours.

claim: JIA Home Co. structures a candle workshop around a guided sensory scent-blending session followed by pouring an 8.5oz hand-poured soy candle to take home.
quote: explore fragrance through a curated sensory experience and custom scent blending before pouring your own 8.5oz hand-poured soy candle to take home.

claim: ClassBento positions tufting as the standout viral craft of the 2025-2026 cycle thanks to its high-impact, same-day rug deliverable.
quote: Rug tufting is driving significant interest due to the ability to create custom, high-value rugs.

claim: A 2026 survey reports 92% of Americans would rather receive experiential gifts than physical ones, up from 77% the prior year.
quote: A striking 92% of participants in a recent survey expressed a preference for receiving experiences rather than physical gifts, a notable increase from 77% the previous year.

claim: ClassBento highlights jewellery-making as a self-care-coded gift category, citing silver clay rings as a beginner entry point with same-session output.
quote: Jewelry making classes are one of the most relaxing quality-time gift ideas, helping ignite creative spark and add self-care to daily routines.

claim: Standard 90-minute beginner wheel-throwing classes typically charge extra for firing and glazing; participants leaving with greenware risk losing the piece during drying.
quote: After throwing on the pottery wheel, you can take green ware (unfired clay) home with you, or with additional charges you can choose to have your piece fired or glazed.

claim: Wecandoo's Brussels flower-candle workshop with Aurélie produces a finished decorative candle in a single session.
quote: Create your own scented flower candle... make your own flower candle with Aurélie, flower maker.
